creator: lian@kras.ru
text:
Do not install FreeBSD 6.3-RELEASE (or FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE or FreeBSD
7.0-RC1) on HP ProLiant DL145G3 with SATA HDD SAMSUNG HD501LJ.

With SATA HDD HP 80GB installation is OK.

In an installation time:
panic: ffs_dirbad: bad dir
or
mode=020141, inum=32896, fs=/tmp
panic: ffs_valloc: dup alloc

How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD 6.3-RELEASE (or FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE or FreeBSD 7.0-RC1)
on HP ProLiant DL145G3 with HDD SAMSUNG HD501LJ.
